list.name: host
list.label: Host
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "monitoring", tag: "host", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "ups", start: -30d)

options.content: **UPS power** via NUT (mtm0, mtm2–5, pve20, pve55 — 7 UPSes; **mtm1 commented out** in `telegraf.conf` per follow-up **P-4**) + **DCMI in-band watts** for the R820s (pve20, pve40). **pve40 has no UPS** of its own — its draw shows under **pve55's TRIPP** (not a gap). **pve55 30d kWh appears low** (~3.6 kWh) because pve55 joined NUT 2026-05-20 (~4 days of data, not 30); ignore the stat until it back-fills. Battery-health panels (Replace-Battery flag, last weekly self-test result, runtime÷load drift, battery age) ship as the next chunk.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ups" and r._field == "watts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> integral(unit: 1h, column: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ host: r.host, _value: r._value / 1000.0 }))

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ups" and r._field == "watts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> group()
  |> integral(unit: 1h, column: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ host: "ALL", _value: r._value / 1000.0 }))

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ups" and r._field == "watts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host"])

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ipmi_dcmi" and r._field == "power_watts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host"])

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ups" and r._field == "watts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ups" and r._field == "battery_charge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host"])

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ups" and r._field == "battery_runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 60.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host"])

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ups" and r._field == "input_voltage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host"])

from(bucket: "monitoring")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ups" and r._field == "load")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /^${host:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host"])
